NSCameraUsageDescription: Stockman huutortoo kameraa ngam scan-de barkodji produits ɗin e kees e e nder inventeer, ƴettude natal produits ɗin ngam hawtude e fis produits ɗin, e ƴettude natal resiwuuji walla dokumentuuji ngam reenude.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stockman naatata e bibliotek natal maa ngam accude ma suɓaade natal gonɗo ngam hawtude e fis produi, resiwu walla dokumaa.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Stockman danndita natal ɗi cosaa e nder bibliotek natal maa, wa resiwuuji, natal produits walla raapoor ɗi génére.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Stockman huutortoo mikiro ngam accude ma hawtude produits ɗin e nder kees bi ak daande maa, e neli haala e nder ndimmaari IA.
